Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a Debian-based Maven/JDK 11 image to an Alpine-based Liberica JDK 21 image to support Java 21.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application requires Java 21 features or compatibility; running on JDK 11 would result in runtime errors or missing API support for the upgraded Spring Boot version.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace Debian package manager (apt-get) with Alpine package manager (apk) for installing system dependencies.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is Alpine Linux, which does not have apt-get; using apt-get would cause a command not found error.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install Maven via apk instead of relying on the base image's pre-installed Maven.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image (liberica-openjdk-alpine) does not include Maven; the build step requires it.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install Node.js using nvm instead of the NodeSource setup script for Debian.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The NodeSource setup script is designed for Debian/Ubuntu and may fail or install incompatible versions on Alpine; nvm provides a portable way to install Node.js on Alpine.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin uses this property; leaving it at 17 prevents compilation on JDK 21 or enforces legacy bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE namespace changes); the application fails to start or compile without a replacement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.validation dependency to bridge legacy validation API usage during migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 moves to Jakarta EE (jakarta.validation); existing code using javax.validation will fail to compile or link without this bridge or migration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Cloud Gateway MVC version to 4.1.3 for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x (compatible with Boot 2.6) is incompatible with Spring Boot 3; dependency resolution or runtime class conflicts occur without upgrade.
